headline: AUDIT STERILITY TO THE FINGERTIP
subheading: A QP's risk-based playbook for proving Annex 1 contamination control, not paperwork.
flux_prompt: An abstract clinical-luxury editorial composition evoking sterile pharmaceutical manufacturing and contamination control. A pristine stainless-steel isolator face and laminar-flow lines rendered as clean geometric forms, with translucent glass vials catching cool reflections, set against a deep navy cleanroom backdrop. Flowing teal and cyan light ribbons trace the path of filtered air sweeping over immaculate surfaces, suggesting controlled airflow and sterility assurance. A delicate web of interconnected nodes and threads overlays the scene as a conceptual metaphor for an integrated contamination control strategy linking facility, equipment and process. A single subtle fresh-green accent glows at one verified control point. Soft volumetric light, fine condensation, shallow depth of field, premium and exacting mood. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
